summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that FE is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $46.47. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 33.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $51.38 and a significant trendline confluence around $48.48 (formed by 4 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
